title: Cover Them In Armor
description: This mod will make survival much more difficult, as it increases the chances of mobs appearing in armor
body:
Cover Them In Armor mod increases the chances of mobs (such as skeleton or zombie) will appear in armor.
Also, each zombie will appear with a sword in the hand (from stone sword to diamond sword).

It is also worth noting that with some chance the enderman will be able to start a fight with you with a ranged attack, which has a 100% chance of hitting.

By the way, each pillager will appear with armor.
